description: Live GitHub + WakaTime activity over the last 7 days.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 17 hrs 53 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 4 hrs 14 mins. His time was spent mostly in Python, TypeScript, and Markdown, along with some SQL and other languages. The activity data shows no GitHub commits, pull requests, or new repositories this week.
